MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-22-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ZOILA RODRIGUEZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE APPLICATION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE APPLICATION IS GRANTED AS TO JURY FEES AND COURT REPORTER FEES, AND DENIED AS TO COURT APPOINTED INTERPRETER'S FEES FOR WITNESSES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DONNA LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
